title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 300.500 - Standing in freight curb loading zones
text:
300.500.  Standing in freight curb loading zones. — No person shall stop, stand, or park a vehicle for any purpose or length of time other than for the expeditious unloading and delivery or pickup and loading of materials in any place marked as a freight curb loading zone during hours when the provisions applicable to such zones are in effect.
(L. 1965 p. 445 § 130)
